summary: Iteration 14: Comprehensive testing of backend refactored routes and frontend UI after modular split. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. All 15 route modules working correctly. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Homepage, Login page, Resume Optimizer page with upload UI, Google sign-in, Google Drive button visible.

issues: Chatbot overlay appears in bottom-right corner - may distract users during resume flow (same as iteration 13)

passed_tests: GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns {message: 'DioCreations API', version: '1.0.0'}
GET /api/config/subdomain - Returns subdomain config for resume.diocreations.eu
POST /api/auth/login - Admin login with admin@diocreations.com:adminpassword works
POST /api/user/register - Creates new public user with session_token
GET /api/resume/pricing - Returns pricing with product_name field
GET /api/resume/templates - Returns exactly 5 templates with style, prompt_instruction
POST /api/resume/linkedin-scrape - Returns response for valid LinkedIn URL
UI: Homepage loads at / with proper navigation
UI: User Login page loads at /login with Google sign-in button
UI: Email/password form visible on login page
UI: Sign Up tab switches to registration form
UI: Resume Optimizer page loads at /resume-optimizer
UI: 4-step progress visible (Upload > Analysis > Optimize > Download)
UI: Upload button and Google Drive button visible
UI: Title 'DioAI Resume & LinkedIn Optimizer' displayed
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring from 3598-line monolithic server.py to 15 modular route files - COMPLETE and working
All routers properly prefixed with /api and included in server.py
ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx (975 lines) - Still above 700 lines, consider splitting into smaller components
Font size controls (A-/A+) correctly implemented with data-testid attributes
Google Drive integration properly returns {configured: false} when no GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID set
24-hour data cleanup background task running correctly on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete - 15 modular route files in /app/backend/routes/. All APIs prefixed with /api/. Google Drive integration NOT configured (no GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID) - returns {configured: false}. 24-hour cleanup task runs as asyncio background task. Font size controls (A-/A+) visible after optimization step. LinkedIn tab appears after optimization. Templates have prompt_instruction for AI formatting and style objects for visual rendering.

features_verified.public_auth: WORKING - register, login, Google callback endpoint
features_verified.linkedin_scraper: WORKING - extracts OG metadata from LinkedIn URLs
features_verified.ui_resume_optimizer: WORKING - upload UI, Google Drive button visible
